items.title: Trump says Russia, Ukraine agree to his request for three-day ceasefire, prisoner swap
items.summary: President Donald Trump says the leaders of Russia and Ukraine have agreed to his request for a three-day ceasefire and an exchange of prisoners
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: US jobs data beats expectations for second month in a row
items.summary: The solid figures came despite rising gas prices and economic uncertainty sparked by the Iran war.

items.title: Live Updates: Starmer’s Party Suffers Stark Losses in U.K. Local Elections
items.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer took responsibility as Labour lost more than a thousand municipal seats but insisted he would not resign.
